recipe.title: Sunday: Mediterranean Ground Chicken Meatballs with Couscous, Cucumber-Tomato Salad & Tzatziki (Aldi tzatziki)
ingredients: tomatoes, diced (use 2 of the gazpacho tomatoes)
steps: Preheat oven to 400F. Line a sheet pan with parchment.
Mix chicken, breadcrumbs, egg, garlic, oregano, cumin, salt, pepper until just combined. Don't overmix.
Bake 20-25 minutes until internal temp reaches 165F.
Bring broth to a boil. Stir in couscous, olive oil, and salt. Cover, remove from heat. Rest 5 minutes. Fluff with fork.
Salad: Toss cucumber, tomatoes, lemon juice, olive oil, parsley, salt, pepper. Chill.
Couscous on bottom, meatballs on top, salad and tzatziki (from Aldi) on the side. Pass extra tzatziki at the table.
